description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND the user has already watched a portion of a Live or Archive game

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects a game tile for a game they've already partially watched
AND selects the same team feed
AND assigns focus to the Resume button
steps.result:
THEN the Feed Modal displays
AND the following statement is spoken, "Resume, press select to resume the game from the previous point, press back to chose a different feed."
